entry.title: border-image兼容性问题
entry.content: #border-image123456789101112131415161718192021<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head> <meta charset="UTF-8" /> <title>border-image属性的示例</title> <style type="text/css"> div{ border:dashed ; height: 100px; width: 500px; border-image:url('bt_blue.png')fill 9/9px stretch; -moz-border-image: url('bt_blue.png') 9/9px ; -webkit-border-image: url('bt_blue.png') 9/9px ; } </style></head><body> <div></div></body></html> 1.以上代码在Chrome56.0 和 Opera 46.0 上完美显示在火狐54.0上显示只有边框虚线部分 在IE11可以显示。11以下无法显示 2.还发现一个奇怪的问题 虽然在火狐上只显示 但是在改变浏览器窗口的大小的时候(或者过一段时间)会变成

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
